data.title: Shanghai Electric Highlights AI-Driven Integration of Energy and Industry at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: In Hannover, Germany, as of April 23, 2026, Shanghai Electric, a leading global company specializing in integrated energy and industrial solutions, is participating in Hannover Messe 2026. The company, listed on SEHK as 02727 and SSE as 601727, is presenting its exhibition under the title "Interlocking Energy and Industry." The showcase features innovative products and services aimed at highlighting the seamless connection between the energy and industrial sectors.

data.title: ExaGrid入围2026年存储大奖最终候选名单
data.description: Marlborough, Massachusetts—ExaGrid®，全球最大的独立备份存储供应商之一，提供分层备份存储解决方案，具备最全面的安全防护和人工智能支持的保留时间锁定功能，可有效对抗勒索软件攻击。该公司宣布，在第23届存储大奖评选中获得16个奖项提名。入围奖项包括年度最佳存储创新企业、年度最佳不可变存储公司、商业领域存储行业领军企业、市场营销存储行业领军企业、卓越渠道奖、年度最佳人工智能数据存储创新企业、和年度最佳网络弹性存储企业等。ExaGrid在本次评选中表现卓越，展示出其在存储技术领域的杰出贡献和创新。

data.title: KIOXIA Introduces New Mainstream BG8 Series SSDs for PC OEMs
data.description: A new series of SSDs, called the BG8 Series, has been launched by KIOXIA in San Jose, California. These SSDs are designed for PC OEM customers as the next generation of client SSDs.

data.title: FPT and GS Engineering & Construction Advance AI-Ready Data Centers, Smart Cities Development in Vietnam
data.description: In HANOI, Vietnam, technology giant FPT has recently entered a Memorandum of Understanding with GS Engineering & Construction Corporation (GS E&C) to enhance cooperation in AI-capable data center infrastructure and smart city construction in Vietnam. This move aims to bolster Vietnam's digital infrastructure goals and promote sustainable urban growth. The agreement was inked during the Viet Nam-South Korea Business Forum in Hanoi, coinciding with the official visit of the South Korean President.

data.title: Fasoul Introduces Wrap Around Heating Technology: Get More from Every Stick
data.description: Berlin-based company Fasoul is introducing a revolutionary heating technology concept in Germany. The innovation revolves around the ability to reuse the same stick twice, made possible by Fasoul's innovative Secondary Mode. This technology enables sticks previously used in devices like IQOS ILUMA to be utilized again in Fasoul devices, effectively extending their utility and ensuring a consistent user experience. By optimizing stick usage, Fasoul not only enhances efficiency but also contributes to lowering consumption expenses. This breakthrough is set to reshape heating device practices in Germany.

data.title: LG ELECTRONICS' WIRELESS TVS FIRST IN WORLD TO EARN "TRUE WIRELESS LOSSLESS VISION" CERTIFICATION
data.description: LG's premium wireless TVs have achieved a milestone as the first globally to be certified by TÜV Rheinland for providing visually lossless 4K picture quality. The certification ensures that the TVs deliver top-notch picture quality without any loss in visual fidelity.

data.title: EVA Air was Recognized with Six Inflight Amenity Awards by TravelPlus, PAX International, and PAX Tech
data.description: Recently at the World Travel Catering & Onboard Services Expo (WTCE) in Hamburg, Germany, EVA Air was honored with a total of six prestigious awards from the TravelPlus Airline Amenity Awards and the PAX International Readership Awards 2026. The awards highlight the airline’s commitment to exceptional service and user experience. This recognition reinforces EVA Air's position as a leading player in the aviation industry.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Agillence, Inc/
data.description: ICL and Agillence have recently revealed a significant collaboration aimed at enhancing the optimization of finished vehicle logistics. The announcement was made on 21-Apr-2026 by Agillence, Inc via PR Newswire. The partnership is expected to bring about crucial advancements in this sector. Stay tuned for further updates on this promising initiative.
